title: What We Do
heading: One Supplier, Many Divisions.
description: Goodway supplies 5 core product divisions — Scientific Lab Instrumentation, Mechanical, Electrical, Instrumentation, Building Material — plus Chemicals, Power, Heavy Equipment, Safety and Office Equipment.
body: What We Do One Supplier, Many Divisions. Goodway operates two complementary businesses: an Industrial Trading Division serving oil, gas, power and water operators, and an Office Equipment Stationery Division serving UAE corporates, government offices and institutions. 9 Product divisions under one supplier What We Bring One supplier, every division your project needs.
